headline: Dow Jones Futures: Market Ready To Go? Nvidia, Micron, Sandisk Near Buy Points With Big Earnings Due
summary: Taiwan Semi, Goldman and GE Aerospace are big earnings due with the market improving. Nvidia, Sandisk, Micron, Robinhood are near buy points.

headline: J.B. Hunt Transport Services (JBHT) Heads Into Earnings As Fair Value Questions Grow
summary: J.B. Hunt Transport Services (JBHT) is back in focus as investors look ahead to its second-quarter 2026 earnings report on July 15. See our latest analysis for J.B. Hunt Transport Services. J.B. Hunt Transport Services shares trade at US$279.96, and while the stock has edged down over the past week, the 90 day share price return of 23.31% and 1 year total shareholder return of 84.06% indicate that momentum has been strong ahead of the earnings update. If the upcoming results have you thinking...
